description.zh: 西夏由党项族李元昊建立，地处河西走廊要冲。政治上仿唐宋官制设中书、枢密等机构，军事优先、佛教辅政。创制独立的西夏文字，注重文化自主。在宋、辽、金的夹缝中存续近两百年，展现了卓越的外交与生存智慧。
description.en: Founded by Li Yuanhao of the Tangut people, Western Xia controlled the strategic Hexi Corridor. Its government modeled Tang-Song institutions with Secretariat and Bureau of Military Affairs. Military-first policy with Buddhist advisory role. Created an independent Tangut script, emphasizing cultural autonomy. Survived nearly two centuries between Song, Liao, and Jin through exceptional diplomacy.
